segments.text: Ananya Bhavesarana, Ananya Bhavesarana, Ananya Bhavesarana
Alpamati Kelevarna, Alpamati Kelevarna
I bow to all the Sahaja Yogis who have found the truth.
There has been from ages, the seeking for the truth
And when people discovered that there's no other way but to surrender
To the divine,
That you can find a truth.
They did not know how do it
How work out
There have been seekers
All over world
I went in Turkey and was amazed
Lots of Sufis
But their disciples were not realized souls
Because the Sufis also did not know how they got their realization.
Such darkness existed around people who were seeking all over
I find when i was a little girl that
They are completely ignorant about
How to Find The Truth
So many were lost in all kinds of so-called religions and rituals,
All kind s of ritual they used to do.
Morning till evening some sort a ritual that would go
Whether there are Hindus, Christians or Muslims
They believe by doing these rituals you will achieve something
That you will know the truth, that you'll get your Self-realization.
All such seekers went to wrong people and to wrong directions
because they were really seeking from their heart
so there was very misleading, misleading
and they were mislaid into such horrible black areas that
They did not know what
What are supposed to seek,
It has been prophesied
That when Kali Yuga will come
People find themselves.
There is a story about Nala
and Kali who had taken away the wife,
the mainty of Nala.
So once Nala caught hold off him
And he said that now I am going to kill you
because we are a very mischievous man
& You have done such harm to me
so the Kali said
You can kill Me, but before that you should know what is My importance.
What my mahatma?
And then My importants are when My time will come – when Kali Yuga comes – all
those people who seek the truth in the jungles and hills-and-dales, in the Himalayas
will become ordinary householders.
They'll be house-holders,
they won't the sannyasis going about –
there' lllbe households
and then we find that truth
This is being prophesied long time back
And also this a book about it
as you must have read in the book
which says
That The Time Has Come For People To Know Themselves
Every religion has said one thing, that you must know yourself.
Islam says the same, Buddha says the same,
Christian say'sthe same, Hindus say'sthe same
so till then they go on doing all kinds of acrobats
but realize we haven't found the truth
So it came to my lot.
From childhood I knew that had do with,
but when saw the human beings
how much in darkness they were about themselves
How aggressive and how sinful there are
All their style was so cruel
That is unbelievable
That was the time also I saw Hitler coming up and our country
Also, wasn't complete bondage. So
The first thing was to make
Our country free
Was very important
And that's why i took a
Very active role in
The movement
That was for the freedom of our country, same with my father and mother.
But when we got that freedom somehow after some time
We've gotten lost
People started taking to all kinds
Of modern things which were wrong
Which are so called entertaining
With all that I found, all over the world there was a big seeking force and some false
people took full advantage of it.
They went out made lots an'lots o f money & with their falseness they cursed them
–I don't know what did to you?
So many seekers were lost like thar.
Despite that, I went to America and I was shocked how the things were going on there.
But i couldn't help it because they where so mentally ill-equipped
They could not understand what have you got
And You can pay for truth
Then It happened That
I had started it after the Sahastrara was broken.
And you know that story how i broke the Sahasrara
and from one person,
l started giving realization
but from America got very disappointed
.I was thinking ,how will grow ? How will work out?
We have about 25 people
who were realized soul by them in India
But they realized what they have got by realization.
They realized that they had become very good people,
and given up all bad habits
And there were wanting to worship Me
I said no-no don't worship me
because the people will not understand
but one day forced it
So on our terrace of house
they came and worshipped Me, because somebody had told them this is the Goddess.
So what happened was after that program one maid servant came up who possessed
And she started calling me by name of goddess
so people said What are you saying?
She's a woman but talking like man
So she said, I'm telling you the truth.
She is a goddess who has come to save us."
Her language was not that of made servant but
very well educated Brahmin
Who would say all Adi Shankaracharyas, Tothras
It's very surprising
so they asked her several questions
and then just fainted
So I told them, just don't listen to her it's no use but they would not agree and
said Mother we have worship.
Somehow agreed that and got hold of seven Brahmins who were afraid because to do the
puja is very dangerous as could harm you if its' not true.
But on the contrary, when they were doing the puja
They got their realization and
just said now this is truth.
The felt a cool breeze in Their hand
all symptoms told about
a realized soul started
but I didn't want to say everything
at that time
because there are many others
who was saying I am these
so i did not want
expose it altogether
But gradually I found that people got attracted and they used to come
And then the Sahaja Yoga started spreading all over in a very interesting manner.
So this Sahastrara Day or we can call it as the day when the Sahasrara was opened out,
is of great importance – its very subtle!
We just know about the Kundalini that she's coiled up in three and a half,
And She is lying on the triangular bone known as Sakra.
But we don't now what She works or how She works?
What happens to us?
She rises in six centers and breaks the sixth center, because Ganesha's center doesn't
play any role.
So when she breaks those 6th Center which is the Sahasrara then she connects you
to all-pervading power of Divine Love!
Now, what is this Divine Love?
What does it do.
It's the energy of Mother, they can say that it has the energy of Adi Shakti which
all over works through vibrations but these vibrations are a very subtle energy that
starts flowing through your Sahasrara.
All the thousand petals of the Sahastrara
get slowly enlightened
and it start flowing throughout you body,
Throughout hands feet
throughout to a body
And more are
I mean attention is on the Sahasrara
The More It works fast
Now in science have read
That they have discovered an energy called, they call it, I don't know what's the scientist
What is that? What energy? Quantum. Quantum Energy. Quantum.
I do not why we call it quantum because quantum means full so
It might be meaning the energy of Ganesha maybe
because scientists are blind people, I don't know what they call water.
So there's a quantum energy
Now this quantum energy according to them flows in very subtle manner
and it is normally not visible but has light
You have seen that in so many photographs of mine, this light
This energy moves like a light. So it is the quantum energy I think again
I am not very sure because scientists are always found them little bit weak
But these quantum energies they're talking about
is something like the spiritual energy or
The Energy of Love, which flows around.
And this quantum energy they do not know what it does
but have seen that It has got light
They call it quantum because according to them
it flows in bundles and every bundle
Is a quanta according
Now when this energy flows as you have seen yourself
It works.
it works in every direction,
In Every Dimension
For Example
It Works Physically
Supposing you have some physical element
You Have Seen Many People Get Cured
In My Presence
Just In my presence
I need not do anything to them
Or also as soon
As i see somebody
I know what he is suffering from
That's Also
I must say
My connection
With the Divine
And that tells me what's wrong with the person and what should be done.
It can be cured in no time, because it also comes to Me just like this
I don't ask any questions or try to find out
nor do I analyze but it says – Do Like This
It also doesn't say, it just does.
Just works automatically
–it is very difficult to explain how this energy works
but all of you who have got Realization
can work out your own energies
How? By releasing them
by feeding and giving it to others
by experimenting. Of course, Sahaja Yoga has spread because of you only
You are the people who have brought to Sahajyoga
But that's not end off it
We had two same this world for that at least I feel 40%
of People should get there and others
Whatever may be their nationality
whatever maybe they're education anything
They Are
to be given Self-Realization in our Indian scriptures, is clearly written without Atmasakshatkar
your life is useless. But what Is atma sakshatkara?
It's the knowledge about yourself
How can you have that knowledge unless and until
You become one with this All Pervading Power
So it was a very great thing I felt
that this Sahastrara I could open in 1970.
And realized, I was overwhelmed
because i knew it is the only trouble
It's just an obstacle human beings are having
Because their Sahasranhas aren't opened
That why they're going into darkness
That's where they are having wars, that is why there have been all kinds of problems.
But if their Sahasrara opens and become one with the Divine Power then all these problems
will be solved – every type problem will be solved!
And people would feel very happy.
I realized it when was overjoyed but nobody understood me.
I don't know, they thought that I must be talking something nonsensical.
Nobody understood it what it is
because even in the Shastras
It's not written about Kundalini so clearly
Only one great saint called Gyaneshwara
wrote In his book in the sixth chapter
About The kundali
Its Not So clear
only he said That with the Kundalini
You can get your awakening
Also you sing that song always I have heard, which says
That oh Kundalini Mother please be awakened
But nobody knows what this kundalini is and why are You singing
It was all in our country people used to sing
In the village so clearly but nobody understood
The meaning of it. Just they use to sing as some sort
a bhajan or could be some sort of music concert, but nobody knew what it was talking about.
It's such misunderstanding everything and all these poets also who have written clearly
about awakening ,about realization . Everything is just in the books they would read one
line of the book, then stop there. Another person would start another line and he stops
at other point like that they were just reading – same thing about all the scriptures
There was big misunderstanding created for their own self-interest That is how we couldn't
get people who understood what was Self-realization. It were just for some money or from certain
type of a position to that, People started big, big organizations very big religious
organizations I don't know how to call them but none of the where realized souls
For example, there was a great saint called Viditama who went to China and he started
the religion called Zen.
Zen means dhyana – and He wanted put zen in such manner that people become thoughtless
He made a big tank full of sand with patterns and put some stones.
And he had said that, you sit on the edge this pond
just see but don't think
People didn´t understand what it was
Normally anybody would go there
Oh! This looks like ships in sea or all kinds things
Nobody tried for thoughtless awareness, and I told some of them that this is
For Thoughtless Awareness. They couldn't understand
Then we have also in Japan Thao
He talked about the All-Pervading Power which was Thao
And Lao Tse Was The One who did
He has described saints, how the saints are.
How they behave?
How do talk what is their mannerism everything but
But you become a saint nobody says I think throughout there have been no description
how to make a person into a saintly personality.
So also in the 12th century, Gnaneshwara was
In The Twelfth Century
He talked about it and he said everything
Because It Was A Kind Of A Style
That A Guru Should Have Only One Disciple
Who should give To one disciple realization
not too many. I don't know why, but what made them such a law or rule? And then it started in the
12th century there were very many saints who sang The Praise of Realization and all
Of Them thought that these rituals are no good so they discarded rituals
and this, but what was the thing that had to happen? Nobody knew. I have read all their
lines –I've read afterwards also many saints who were there–but it seems nobody
knew how raise kundalini! This is a basic problem they didn't know
how to raise the Kundalini. While I think they didn't have that power or maybe
had no knowledge,
They talked about kundalini all right
but did not know
How To Raise The Kundalini
This is a very special Power of spirituality
None Of Them Have Been Able
TO SAY OR TELL YOU HOW TO RAISE THE KUNDALIN
Now You All Have Got This Power
Which Is Such A Rare Thing
All of you have got it. I don't see anybody who doesn' t hae that power to raise the Kundalini
You may not,
but maybe contented with yourself
But thats's a very good thing
If your Sahastrara opened out
and if know how to raise the kundalini
then must go allout to give realization
Nothing is going benefit people more
than Self-realization. No use doing other charities, giving money or giving this is of no
Use! Best thing to go all out and see people who want their Realisation
And give them Realisation
I was very happy that they have started working it out on the gypsies
I have a special feeling for gypsies.
For no fault of theirs they are leading very miserable life, and how the gypsy's got
their realization?
You can see that you give it to anyone who wants
To Have It!
One thing is there –you cannot force on them.
If They have A Desire, A Pure Desir, They Can Get Self-Realization.
So this day, I have to just say now so many years have passed.
Have worked quite hard
Day and night
And my only desire was
That you people should take
It seriously
An work it out
Don't keep your realization to yourself
As may as the people can give realization
The greatest
Obligation will be on Me
and on God Almighty.
Only thing is you should try to give realizations
To others,
You will never make a mistake
because the Kundalini knows
She know's your realized soul
she'll respect
Even if we makes mistakes
She correct it
And she help
In every way
I am just
I should say a housewife, who had no support from anyone.
But i was sure that it's my job to find out how
To break the Sahastrara whatever way
It is outside doesn't matter
My Job he wants
To Find Out The Breaking of Sahasrara which
I did now you also know
That so this Is your job and
And the scientists now will be coming around you to ask you questions, because they don't
know what we are talking about is – What We Are Already Doing.
So You're so powerful all of them!
But how many people really doing this work?
Is a point…
Today's very important day I want tell that you have to strengthen my hands.
They say the Goddess has one thousand hands, but even the one-thousand hands are now asking
that you come along with your two hand and work it out.
It's very important what we have to do!
All kinds of problems in this world they come because ignorance take it politics
take it, any problem. And how is solved? Is also your power with the Divine! I'll give
you one simple example that Turkish people came and were begging of Me whether You
must come or should not postpone. My passport was a problem so I said my passport
is not ready, how will I come? Then I thought why not we'll have the passport also done.
So passport was ready and they wanted me to go Turkey because say that financial condition
has gone down very much, the economy had gone down absolutely, we are ruined!
i went there ,I didn't do anything about it within two days they announced 10 billion
dollar help from the World Bank. Now I didn't talk to World Bank, had nothing
do with them –I don´t know. Then i said no maybe you see they are helping
because U people in such trouble but so many countries are why have
helped us only?
So now
I was surprised that in Turkey there were only ladies mostly who
leaders mostly, and they have done such a big job.
So I want to see what you people are doing in your country?
You may say that
In my Country the People Are Hopelessly Bad
maybe...I don't Say No
but still there are places
There are pockets where
Where can go And talk To them Tell them
Specially The Media
You must handle it. It is something you have to do and find out why
can't we, like me I was not supported by anybody
Not helped by anyone
And how i managed break the Sahastrara
You also broke the Sahasrara of others
Its not difficult because my vision
Is that this world
At least you'd have forty percent people who are realized souls and who
practicing Sahaja Yoga,
Who is giving realization to the people
And trying
To change them.
Anybody can go on, anybody!
There's no need
To discriminate or find out
Or sit down with their... I mean
People take sometimes
The copy of
their education and this, that's not needed.
Whosoever it is I am saying give to dogs or animals
but human beings wherever they are
They may be anything
English
Germans
Italians
Anywhere
I am told also some people are doing lots of seminars and working very hard on all levels
And it is working out. Among Muslims, we have started to work
Even in India It has worked
You don't know that People haven not lost their heads
So they can workout
Don´t be very much disappointed or upset about
Gradually things will improve
I think the greatest enemy of our self-realization is the drinking.
Drinking, if people stick to drinking they become such slaves
that their brains are not all right
so I thinks the Sahastrara also must be spoilt with drinking
So drinking i thing it's worst anyway
and If you could find anybody drinking
If you could help that man to give up drinking itself, it will work out.
Of course we have other enemies also like false gurus are there –
Also We Have Other Enemies Who Are Having Some Sort of Religious Manipulations
But That's Not So Important
If you can get hold of people who are drinking, I tell it will change and they'll now understand
that what we have been doing so far – drinking running away.
Now there come to the fields and work out such a thing!
So your like very gentle soldiers of love
And that's what you have to spread and talk to others, give them the joy
not be satisfied if
You've got it only or few of you haven't.
We'll have to spread very fast
because It doesn' require money
It is just inside
It works already there
It's present there
Everybody has it
I knew all this
Of course i knew
But now you also know it, so should work out and work in the manner that I'm sure one
chatwari bhagavadani tuam guna trayatita tuam deha
trayatita, tuam kala trayatita. Tuam muladhara sthityasi nithyam
tuam shakti trayatmaka, tuam yogino dhyayanti nityaṁ.
Tuam brahmā, tuam viṣṇuś, tuam rudras,
tuam indragas, tuam aignīś,
tuam vaius, tu am suryas,
tuam candramas,
tuam brahma-bhūrbhuva svaroṁ.
gaṇadim purvam acarya,
varnadhim taranantaram anusvara paratara adhenula siddham tarena raddhaṁ etattava manuśvarūpaṁ
Gakara purva rupam anur madhyama rupam
Anusvara shantyar upa bindu ruddhara rupa
Nadasandhana sanitasandi
Saisha ganesha vidya ganaka rishi
Shrutgayatri chanda ganapathir devatam
Aum Gyaam Ganapataye Namaha Ekadantaya Vidmahe Vakra Tundayadi Mahi
Thanodanti Prachoda Yath Ekadantam Chaturasthampashaman Kushdarinam
Radhamchavardham Asthaibhi Brhananmushak Dwajam
Raktam lambodaram surpa karnakamm, raksa gandhanu liptahm gam
Rakta pushpahi supujitnam Bhaktanukampinam devam jagat karanama chyutham
Abhirbutam ca swasthidrav prakrute purushad param
E vam jaya tiyo nityaṁ sa yogi yogināṁ varah
Namo vrata-pataye, Namo gaṇa-pataye
Namaḥ brahmatapate namaste astu-laṁ bodharaay
Ekadantāya vigyānanaśine śiva sūtāya
Śrīvārada murtaiye namaha
Shatsri Adishakti Mataji Sri Nirmala Devye Namo
Sudambha Jai Ganeshavishanandam Prikananda
Married ladies from the hosting countries.
Janko Savera Aaya Hai, Mata Ne Jagaiya Hai

Bhivkhariya Samudita

Visugranthi Vipidini
Mata Abhavani

Mah Bhakhtigamyah

On behalf of you all, I offer the international present to Shri Mataji for this puja.
This was a national present from the Austin countries
Shri Mataji! Shri Mataji!
Happy To see You All in such joyous mood and bring the whole world into the same light
I've got some presents for the people, specially Sahaja Yogis who have been part of this Kansai
Pooja.
Those whom are involved those countries that were involved so first we'll be giving
to men, and then the ladies. You know the countries who have been involved?
Slovakia, Czech Republic, Slovenia, Germany, Austria, Hungary also
Six... Is it six or seven? The man of Slovakia
And the men of Czech Republic prepare themselves
and the man from Hungary, Germany, Austria
and Czech Republic should also prepare themself
So those who are prepared can come forward please
